stemHtml: What happens to the stability of the fuselage and overall directional stability of the aircraft when the CG moves aft?

options.a: The fuselage stability increases and the directional stability decreases.
options.b: The fuselage stability decreases and the directional stability decreases.
options.c: The fuselage stability increases and the directional stability increases.
options.d: The fuselage stability decreases and the directional stability increases.
